untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of: (1) 'rejection candle' formation - requires pattern recognition logic not available in indicator set (lower wick/body rejection pattern); (2) 'support level' identification - requires dynamic support detection not provided by static indicators; (3) 'retracement ends at support' - requires multi-candle pattern context. The core rejection candle pattern (specific wick-to-body ratio, formation at support) cannot be expressed with allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using close crossing above previous high (breakout of rejection candle) combined with RSI > 50 (strength confirmation) and stop below recent low. However, this loses the critical pattern recognition elements: rejection candle structure, support level confirmation, and retracement validation. Recommend implementing custom rejection_candle indicator or multi-condition pattern detector for accurate signal translation.
